text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen. Thanks for that jar of peanut butter you
gave me. It was really good!

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
I've been putting it on everything, and it's been
perfect.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
I know, right? It's great on toast, and I love
sneaking it into things as a secret ingredient. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Oh, same. I tried some on my pasta the other day.

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text:
Yeah. I was making carbonara and figured hey,
why not. It came out a bit sweet, though, so I'll
have to add more salt and pepper next time.

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
...Heh. Hahahaha! I never would have thought of
peanut butter carbonara!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
That creativity of yours is always so charming. I
really love your ideas! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mr. C.B.
text_block_list.text: Thanks, Maruzen. I really love your mindset too.
